scripts.build:android: cd apps/app && bun scripts/build.mjs && capacitor sync android
scripts.build:ios: cd apps/app && bun scripts/build.mjs && capacitor sync ios
scripts.verify: bun run verify:typecheck && bun run verify:lint
scripts.verify:format: bunx @biomejs/biome format scripts test apps eliza/packages eliza/plugins eliza/apps eliza/cloud eliza/steward-fi
scripts.verify:format:fix: bunx @biomejs/biome format --write scripts test apps eliza/packages eliza/plugins eliza/apps eliza/cloud eliza/steward-fi
scripts.db:check: node eliza/packages/app-core/scripts/run-with-env.mjs MILADY_LIVE_TEST=1 ELIZA_LIVE_TEST=1 -- bunx vitest run --config test/vitest/live-e2e.config.ts eliza/packages/agent/test/database-conversation.live.e2e.test.ts
scripts.dev:android: cd apps/app && bun scripts/build.mjs && capacitor sync android && capacitor open android
scripts.dev:ios: cd apps/app && bun scripts/build.mjs && capacitor sync ios && capacitor open ios
scripts.docs:build: cd docs && bun exec mint broken-links
scripts.test:desktop:playwright:windows: cd apps/app && bunx playwright test --config playwright.electrobun.packaged.config.ts
scripts.test:e2e: node eliza/packages/app-core/scripts/run-with-env.mjs MILADY_LIVE_TEST=1 ELIZA_LIVE_TEST=1 -- bunx vitest run --config test/vitest/e2e.config.ts --exclude eliza/packages/agent/test/anvil-contracts.real.e2e.test.ts --exclude eliza/packages/app-core/test/app/memory-relationships.real.e2e.test.ts --exclude eliza/packages/app-core/test/app/onboarding-companion.live.e2e.test.ts --exclude eliza/packages/app-core/test/app/qa-checklist.real.e2e.test.ts
scripts.test:real: MILADY_LIVE_TEST=1 ELIZA_LIVE_TEST=1 bunx vitest run --config test/vitest/real.config.ts
scripts.test:ci:real: MILADY_LIVE_TEST=1 ELIZA_LIVE_TEST=1 MILADY_CI_REAL=1 bunx vitest run --config test/vitest/real.config.ts
scripts.test:real:agent: MILADY_LIVE_TEST=1 ELIZA_LIVE_TEST=1 bunx vitest run --config test/vitest/real.config.ts --include 'eliza/packages/agent/**'
scripts.test:real:app-core: MILADY_LIVE_TEST=1 ELIZA_LIVE_TEST=1 bunx vitest run --config test/vitest/real.config.ts --include 'eliza/packages/app-core/**'
scripts.test:real:qa: node eliza/packages/app-core/scripts/run-with-env.mjs MILADY_LIVE_TEST=1 ELIZA_LIVE_TEST=1 MILADY_LIVE_BROWSER_SUITE=1 -- bunx vitest run --config test/vitest/real-qa.config.ts
scripts.test:e2e:heavy: node eliza/packages/app-core/scripts/run-with-env.mjs MILADY_LIVE_TEST=1 ELIZA_LIVE_TEST=1 MILADY_LIVE_BROWSER_SUITE=1 -- bunx vitest run --config test/vitest/live-e2e.config.ts eliza/packages/agent/test/anvil-contracts.real.e2e.test.ts eliza/packages/app-core/test/app/memory-relationships.real.e2e.test.ts eliza/packages/app-core/test/app/onboarding-companion.live.e2e.test.ts eliza/packages/app-core/test/app/qa-checklist.real.e2e.test.ts
scripts.test:e2e:validation: node eliza/packages/app-core/scripts/run-with-env.mjs MILADY_LIVE_TEST=1 ELIZA_LIVE_TEST=1 -- bunx vitest list --config test/vitest/e2e.config.ts
scripts.test:e2e:coding-agents: bun run test:orchestrator:integration && node eliza/packages/app-core/scripts/run-with-env.mjs MILADY_LIVE_TEST=1 ELIZA_LIVE_TEST=1 -- bunx vitest run --config test/vitest/live-e2e.config.ts eliza/packages/agent/test/coding-agent-codex-artifact.live.e2e.test.ts eliza/packages/agent/test/quicksort-coding-agent.live.e2e.test.ts
scripts.test:integration:coding-agents: bun run test:orchestrator:integration && bunx vitest run --config test/vitest/integration.config.ts eliza/packages/agent/test/coding-agent-route-readiness.integration.test.ts eliza/packages/agent/test/coding-agent-chat-roundtrip.integration.test.ts
scripts.test:selfcontrol:e2e: node eliza/packages/app-core/scripts/run-with-env.mjs MILADY_LIVE_TEST=1 ELIZA_LIVE_TEST=1 -- bunx vitest run --config test/vitest/live-e2e.config.ts eliza/packages/agent/test/selfcontrol-dev.live.e2e.test.ts eliza/packages/agent/test/selfcontrol-desktop.live.e2e.test.ts
scripts.test:selfcontrol:startup: node eliza/packages/app-core/scripts/run-with-env.mjs MILADY_LIVE_TEST=1 ELIZA_LIVE_TEST=1 MILADY_LIVE_CHAT_TEST=1 MILADY_LIVE_SELFCONTROL_CHAT_TEST=1 MILADY_LIVE_SELFCONTROL_DEV_TEST=1 -- bunx vitest run --config test/vitest/live-e2e.config.ts eliza/packages/agent/test/selfcontrol-chat.live.e2e.test.ts eliza/packages/agent/test/selfcontrol-dev.live.e2e.test.ts
scripts.test:live:cloud: node eliza/packages/app-core/scripts/run-with-env.mjs MILADY_LIVE_TEST=1 -- bunx vitest run --config test/vitest/live-e2e.config.ts eliza/packages/agent/test/cloud-providers.live.e2e.test.ts
scripts.test:live:evm:rpc: node eliza/packages/app-core/scripts/run-with-env.mjs MILADY_LIVE_TEST=1 ELIZA_LIVE_TEST=1 MILADY_LIVE_EVM_RPC_TEST=1 -- bunx vitest run --config test/vitest/real.config.ts eliza/plugins/plugin-evm/typescript/__tests__/integration/rpc-providers-live.test.ts
scripts.test:live:onboarding: node eliza/packages/app-core/scripts/run-with-env.mjs MILADY_LIVE_TEST=1 ELIZA_LIVE_TEST=1 MILADY_LIVE_BROWSER_SUITE=1 -- bunx vitest run --config test/vitest/live-e2e.config.ts eliza/packages/app-core/test/app/onboarding-companion.live.e2e.test.ts
scripts.test:live:memory-relationships: node eliza/packages/app-core/scripts/run-with-env.mjs MILADY_LIVE_TEST=1 ELIZA_LIVE_TEST=1 MILADY_LIVE_BROWSER_SUITE=1 -- bunx vitest run --config test/vitest/live-e2e.config.ts eliza/packages/app-core/test/app/memory-relationships.real.e2e.test.ts
scripts.test:live:lifeops:chat: node eliza/packages/app-core/scripts/run-with-env.mjs MILADY_LIVE_TEST=1 MILADY_LIVE_CHAT_TEST=1 -- bunx vitest run --config test/vitest/live-e2e.config.ts eliza/packages/agent/test/lifeops-chat.live.e2e.test.ts
scripts.test:live:lifeops:memory: node eliza/packages/app-core/scripts/run-with-env.mjs MILADY_LIVE_TEST=1 MILADY_LIVE_CHAT_TEST=1 MILADY_LIVE_MEMORY_TEST=1 -- bunx vitest run --config test/vitest/live-e2e.config.ts eliza/packages/agent/test/lifeops-memory.live.e2e.test.ts
scripts.test:live:lifeops:scenarios: node eliza/packages/app-core/scripts/run-with-env.mjs MILADY_LIVE_TEST=1 MILADY_LIVE_CHAT_TEST=1 MILADY_LIVE_SCENARIO_TEST=1 -- bunx vitest run --config test/vitest/live-e2e.config.ts eliza/packages/agent/test/lifeops-scenarios.live.e2e.test.ts
scripts.test:live:lifeops:lifecycle: node eliza/packages/app-core/scripts/run-with-env.mjs MILADY_LIVE_TEST=1 MILADY_LIVE_CHAT_TEST=1 MILADY_LIVE_SCENARIO_TEST=1 -- bun run lifeops:scenarios:lifecycle
scripts.test:live:lifeops:variants: node eliza/packages/app-core/scripts/run-with-env.mjs MILADY_LIVE_TEST=1 MILADY_LIVE_CHAT_TEST=1 MILADY_LIVE_SCENARIO_TEST=1 -- bun run lifeops:scenarios:variants
scripts.test:live:selfcontrol:chat: node eliza/packages/app-core/scripts/run-with-env.mjs MILADY_LIVE_TEST=1 MILADY_LIVE_CHAT_TEST=1 MILADY_LIVE_SELFCONTROL_CHAT_TEST=1 -- bunx vitest run --config test/vitest/live-e2e.config.ts eliza/packages/agent/test/selfcontrol-chat.live.e2e.test.ts
scripts.test:live:selfcontrol:dev: node eliza/packages/app-core/scripts/run-with-env.mjs MILADY_LIVE_TEST=1 MILADY_LIVE_SELFCONTROL_DEV_TEST=1 -- bunx vitest run --config test/vitest/live-e2e.config.ts eliza/packages/agent/test/selfcontrol-dev.live.e2e.test.ts
scripts.test:live:selfcontrol:desktop: node eliza/packages/app-core/scripts/run-with-env.mjs MILADY_LIVE_TEST=1 MILADY_LIVE_DESKTOP_TEST=1 -- bunx vitest run --config test/vitest/live-e2e.config.ts eliza/packages/agent/test/selfcontrol-desktop.live.e2e.test.ts
scripts.test:live:browser-workspace: node eliza/packages/app-core/scripts/run-with-env.mjs MILADY_LIVE_TEST=1 -- bunx vitest run --config test/vitest/live-e2e.config.ts eliza/packages/agent/test/browser-workspace-agent-chat.live.e2e.test.ts
scripts.test:live:identity: node eliza/packages/app-core/scripts/run-with-env.mjs MILADY_LIVE_TEST=1 -- bunx vitest run --config test/vitest/live-e2e.config.ts eliza/packages/agent/test/identity-live.test.ts
scripts.test:live:knowledge: node eliza/packages/app-core/scripts/run-with-env.mjs MILADY_LIVE_TEST=1 ELIZA_LIVE_TEST=1 MILADY_LIVE_KNOWLEDGE_TEST=1 -- bunx vitest run --config test/vitest/live-e2e.config.ts eliza/packages/agent/test/knowledge-live.e2e.test.ts
scripts.test:live:plugins: node eliza/packages/app-core/scripts/run-with-env.mjs MILADY_LIVE_TEST=1 -- bunx vitest run --config test/vitest/live-e2e.config.ts eliza/packages/agent/test/plugin-lifecycle.live.e2e.test.ts
scripts.test:live: node eliza/packages/app-core/scripts/run-with-env.mjs MILADY_LIVE_TEST=1 -- bunx vitest run --config test/vitest/live-e2e.config.ts eliza/packages/agent/test/wallet-live.e2e.test.ts eliza/packages/agent/test/api-auth-live.e2e.test.ts eliza/packages/agent/test/cloud-providers.live.e2e.test.ts eliza/packages/agent/test/lifeops-chat.live.e2e.test.ts eliza/packages/agent/test/selfcontrol-chat.live.e2e.test.ts eliza/packages/agent/test/selfcontrol-dev.live.e2e.test.ts
